name: Virtual Context
description: Full context window management via Virtual Context REST API

vcKey.description: Virtual Context API key (sent as X-VC-Key header)

baseUrl.description: VC REST API base URL (default: https://api.virtual-context.com)

providers.description: List of provider/model strings to activate for (e.g. ["openai-direct/gpt-5.4"]). Empty or omitted = all providers.

debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging of REST API calls, payloads, and responses. Default: false.
